title: No retry on temporary failure in network name resolution
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

If the systemd service can't download the image, it just aborts without retry.
I use `restartPolicy: on-failure`.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. It happens randomly. Probably on podman auto update.

**Describe the results you received:**
```
× podman-kube@-home-servername-ServerContainerTemplate-container-services-dynds\x2dhttps\x2dip-dyndns\x2dhttps\x2dip\x2dpod.yaml.service - A template for running K8s workloads via podman-play-kube

   Main PID: 1808 (code=exited, status=125)
        CPU: 170ms

Okt 27 15:27:33 servername podman[1873]: time="2022-10-27T15:27:33+02:00" level=error msg="Cleaning up service container after failure: container f0e453c1a2d73cf84f49073ab98710354aea3073d1a06ce14e8b8b04803cbb1f is the service container of pod(s) 097e5cc618b0ae068c0d6ad1167f57ca0810db2b65342e1b05692c99e897706d and cannot be removed without removing the pod(s)"
Okt 27 15:27:33 servername podman[1873]: Error: initializing source docker://ghcr.io/linuxserver/swag:latest: pinging container registry ghcr.io: Get "https://ghcr.io/v2/": dial tcp: lookup ghcr.io: Temporary failure in name resolution
Okt 27 15:27:33 servername systemd[1782]: podman-kube@-home-servername-ServerContainerTemplate-container-services-dynds\x2dhttps\x2dip-dyndns\x2dhttps\x2dip\x2dpod.yaml.service: Main process exited, code=exited, status=125/n/a
Okt 27 15:27:33 servername systemd[1782]: podman-kube@-home-servername-ServerContainerTemplate-container-services-dynds\x2dhttps\x2dip-dyndns\x2dhttps\x2dip\x2dpod.yaml.service: Failed with result 'exit-code'.
Okt 27 15:27:33 servername systemd[1782]: Failed to start A template for running K8s workloads via podman-play-kube.
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
A retry after a period.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

comments.body: I opened https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/16385 to set the restart policy.  I can also be set via `systemctl start --property` but I think on-failure is a sane default.

> I opened #16385 to set the restart policy. I can also be set via `systemctl start --property` but I think on-failure is a sane default.

I closed the PR again as did not seem like the right approach on second thought.

What's important in the above error message is:
> [...] dial tcp: lookup ghcr.io: Temporary failure in name resolution

This failure doesn't seem to be caught by the pull-retry semantics (podman attempts at most three pulls by default). The [net.Error](https://pkg.go.dev/net#Error) interface strongly discourages from using the `Temporary()` method, and we are already using the `Timeout()` one. So I am not sure what do to here.  Ultimately it looks like a transient network error to me and there is only so much (or little) podman can do.

@mtrmac, WDYT?

My first impression is that this should indeed be treated as restartable by `c/common/pkg/retry` — but I didn’t now check what’s the exact type / shape / structure of the error value, so I have no opinion on what’s the best way to implement that at the moment.

I recently installer podman 4.3 and I am facing the same issue mentioned above. I have tried running the following 2 commands
1. docker pull mcr.microsoft.com/mssql/rhel/server:2019-latest
2. podman pull mcr.microsoft.com/mssql/rhel/server:2019-latest

The first command seems to work the second is failing. with error - Error: initializing source docker://mcr.microsoft.com/mssql/rhel/server:2019-latest: pinging container registry mcr.microsoft.com: Get "https://mcr.microsoft.com/v2/": dial tcp: lookup mcr.microsoft.com: Temporary failure in name resolution
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Same behaviour with Windows 10 (19044.2364) Windows Feature Experience Pack 120.2212.4190.0

PS C:\Users\malcubierre> podman run -dt -p 8080:80/tcp docker.io/library/httpd
Trying to pull docker.io/library/httpd:latest...
Error: initializing source docker://httpd:latest: pinging container registry registry-1.docker.io: Get "https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/": dial tcp: lookup registry-1.docker.io: Temporary failure in name resolution

PS C:\Users\malcubierre> podman search httpd --filter=is-official
Error: 4 errors occurred:

        * couldn't search registry "registry.access.redhat.com": pinging container registry registry.access.redhat.com: Get "https://registry.access.redhat.com/v2/": dial tcp: lookup registry.access.redhat.com: Temporary failure in name resolution
        * couldn't search registry "docker.io": pinging container registry index.docker.io: Get "https://index.docker.io/v2/": dial tcp: lookup index.docker.io: Temporary failure in name resolution
        * couldn't search registry "quay.io": pinging container registry quay.io: Get "https://quay.io/v2/": dial tcp: lookup quay.io: Temporary failure in name resolution

Problem seems to be inside WSL linux machine....
